features.name: typed localparam with explicit bit-vector type used as module parameter
features.description: Code should include a localparam declaration with explicit logic/bit-vector type (e.g., logic[4:0]) that is passed as a parameter to another module

features.name: parameter used to calculate MSB for wire declaration
features.description: Code should include a parameter used to calculate MSB (MSB = WIDTH - 1) which is then used to declare a wire with [MSB:0] range

features.name: bit slice using computed MSB minus one
features.description: Code should include a bit slice operation using MSB-1 as the upper bound (e.g., a[MSB-1:0]) where MSB is computed from a parameter
